turns.speaker: D
turns.text: hello , mrs . martinez . good to see Mrs. Martinez today .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: hey , Dr. Gomez .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: hey , dragon , Dr. Gomez is here seeing Mrs. Martinez . Mrs. Martinez is a 43-year-old female . why are Dr. Gomez and Mrs. Martinez seeing Mrs. Martinez today ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: um , Mrs. Martinez's arm hurts right here . kind of toward Mrs. Martinez's wrist . this part of Mrs. Martinez's arm .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: so Mrs. Martinez has pain in Mrs. Martinez's distal radius ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: yes .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: how did the pain in Mrs. Martinez's distal radius happen ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: um , Mrs. Martinez was playing tennis , and when Mrs. Martinez went to hit , um , Mrs. Martinez was given a , a backhand , and when Mrs. Martinez did , Mrs. Martinez m- totally missed the ball , hit the top of the net but the pole part . and , and the impact just jarred Mrs. Martinez's arm .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay . and did Mrs. Martinez's arm swell up at all ? or-

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: Mrs. Martinez's arm did . Mrs. Martinez's arm got a ... Mrs. Martinez's arm had a little bit of swelling . not a lot .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay . and , um , did , uh , does Mrs. Martinez have any numbness in Mrs. Martinez's hand at all ? or any pain when Mrs. Martinez moves Mrs. Martinez's wrist ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: a little bit when Mrs. Martinez moves Mrs. Martinez's wrist . um , no numbness in Mrs. Martinez's hand .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay . does Mrs. Martinez have any past medical history of anything ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: um , yes . allergic , um , l- Mrs. Martinez has allergies . and so Mrs. Martinez takes flonase .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay . and any surgeries in the past ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: yes . Mrs. Martinez actually had a trauma of , um , a stabbing of , um ... Mrs. Martinez actually fell doing lawn work-

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: on Mrs. Martinez's rake .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: yeah .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: Dr. Gomez was wondering where Mrs. Martinez were going to go with that .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: yeah .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay . great . so , let's take a look at , uh , the x-ray of Mrs. Martinez's arm . hey dragon , let's see the x-ray . okay , looking at the x-ray of Mrs. Martinez's arm , Dr. Gomez do n't see any fractures , uh , do n't really see any abnormalities at all . the x-ray of Mrs. Martinez's arm looks essentially normal . great . let Dr. Gomez examine Mrs. Martinez .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: okay .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: does Mrs. Martinez's arm hurt when Dr. Gomez presses on Mrs. Martinez's arm here ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: yes .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay . how about when Dr. Gomez bends Mrs. Martinez's arm ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: yes .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay . that's pretty tender , ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: mm-hmm .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: how about when Dr. Gomez goes backwards like that ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: not as much .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: and how about when Dr. Gomez flexes like this ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: a little .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: but mostly when Dr. Gomez does that type of motion ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: yes .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay , great . so , um , Mrs. Martinez has pain following hitting Mrs. Martinez's arm on the net . on Mrs. Martinez's exam , Mrs. Martinez definitely has some tenderness over Mrs. Martinez's distal radius , um , on Mrs. Martinez's arm . Mrs. Martinez has pain when Dr. Gomez stresses especially Mrs. Martinez's thumb , and , and flexes Mrs. Martinez's thumb . so , Dr. Gomez think what Mrs. Martinez has is basically just a strain and maybe a contusion to that muscle , from hitting Mrs. Martinez's arm . um , Mrs. Martinez certainly do n't have a fracture . Dr. Gomez think at this point , Dr. Gomez and Mrs. Martinez are really going to treat the strain and contusion conservatively . Dr. Gomez will have Mrs. Martinez use ice , um , uh , for the pain and swelling . and some anti inflammatory . um , what Dr. Gomez and Mrs. Martinez will do is give Mrs. Martinez some motrin , 800 milligrams three times a day , with food . um , if the pain and swelling does n't get any better in the next week or so , let Dr. Gomez know , and Dr. Gomez and Mrs. Martinez will take a look at Mrs. Martinez again .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: okay .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay , great . hey dragon , go ahead and order the procedures , and the medications as discussed . why do n't Mrs. Martinez come with Dr. Gomez . dragon you can finalize the note .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: thank Dr. Gomez .
